fileNodes.name: entities.py
fileNodes.summary: Pydantic models and dataclasses for migration entity extraction. Defines DocumentedChange and ExtractionResult dataclasses, enums (EntityKind, EntityRole, StepType, Effort, ScopeLevel, Severity), and Pydantic models (AffectedEntity, BreakingScopeInput, MigrationStep, MigrationEntity, MigrationEntitiesBatch). Also exports SOURCE_SECTION_TO_RULE_TYPE mapping.

fileNodes.name: base.py
fileNodes.summary: Abstract base extractor and shared HTTP client infrastructure. Defines BaseExtractor ABC with async extract/discover_versions/extract_range methods, URL caching, GitHub release fetching, and GA version filter functions (is_jboss_ga_version, is_infinispan_ga_version, is_spring_boot_ga_version).

fileNodes.name: parsing.py
fileNodes.summary: Shared parsing utilities for framework HTTP extractors. Provides version comparison/range/hop computation, Maven metadata XML parsing, POM dependency parsing, BOM diffing, GitHub release text parsing, Markdown statement parsing, AsciiDoc migration guide parsing, and HTML-to-text conversion.

fileNodes.name: filters.py
fileNodes.summary: Shared pre-release version filters for Maven-based extractors. Re-exports is_jboss_ga_version and is_infinispan_ga_version from base.py and provides _skip_prerelease() function that checks JBOSS_SKIP_PRERELEASE env var and config.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Extractor registry module. Exports get_extractor() factory, supported_framework_keys(), render_raw_markdown(), FRAMEWORK_DISPLAY_NAMES, REGISTRY_KEYS, and the _EXTRACTOR_CLASSES dict mapping framework keys to extractor classes.

fileNodes.name: stubs.py
fileNodes.summary: Defines StubExtractor base class that raises NotImplementedError for all methods. Concrete stub extractors (RESTEasy, Elytron) that have version discovery but no extract implementation inherit from this.

fileNodes.name: stub_framework.py
fileNodes.summary: Test stub extractor for pipeline integration tests. Provides two hardcoded versions (1.0.0, 2.0.0) and returns synthetic breaking/behavioral DocumentedChange objects.

fileNodes.name: spring_boot.py
fileNodes.summary: Spring Boot HTTP extractor. Discovers versions from Maven Central, fetches GitHub releases and wiki release notes, strips Dependency Upgrades sections, and generates BOM diff metadata via Spring Boot dependencies POM.

fileNodes.name: angular.py
fileNodes.summary: Angular HTTP extractor. Discovers versions from the npm registry, fetches GitHub releases, augments with CHANGELOG.md sections, and collects blog insight summaries from Angular blog links found in release bodies.

fileNodes.name: eap.py
fileNodes.summary: JBoss EAP HTTP extractor. Uses a static version table (EAP_VERSION_TABLE with EAPVersionEntry dataclass) to map EAP versions to Red Hat documentation slugs. Fetches migration guide and release notes HTML from Red Hat docs portal.

fileNodes.name: elytron.py
fileNodes.summary: WildFly Elytron extractor stub. Implements version discovery from Maven Central with JBoss GA filtering, but extract() raises NotImplementedError via StubExtractor.

fileNodes.name: hibernate.py
fileNodes.summary: Hibernate ORM HTTP extractor. Discovers versions from Maven Central with JBoss GA filtering, fetches AsciiDoc migration guides for v6+ or GitHub release notes for older versions.

fileNodes.name: infinispan.py
fileNodes.summary: Infinispan HTTP extractor. Discovers versions from Maven Central with Infinispan-specific GA filtering (handles dual version conventions for pre/post 16.x), fetches GitHub releases.

fileNodes.name: jakarta_ee.py
fileNodes.summary: Jakarta EE namespace migration extractor (no HTTP). Uses a static version list and hardcoded NAMESPACE_MAPPINGS to generate mandatory_migration changes when crossing the EE9 javax→jakarta boundary.

fileNodes.name: resteasy.py
fileNodes.summary: RESTEasy extractor stub. Implements version discovery from Maven Central with JBoss GA filtering, but extract() raises NotImplementedError via StubExtractor.

fileNodes.name: test_angular.py
fileNodes.summary: Tests for AngularExtractor. Mocks npm registry and GitHub API responses to verify release body parsing and blog_insights metadata structure.

fileNodes.name: test_eap.py
fileNodes.summary: Tests for EAPExtractor. Mocks Red Hat documentation HTML responses and verifies CLI subsystem hints are detected as mandatory_migration.

fileNodes.name: test_elytron.py
fileNodes.summary: Tests for ElytronExtractor stub. Verifies that calling extract() raises NotImplementedError matching the WildFly Elytron display name.

fileNodes.name: test_hibernate.py
fileNodes.summary: Tests for HibernateExtractor. Mocks Maven metadata and AsciiDoc migration guide responses to verify AsciiDoc parsing produces at least one change.

fileNodes.name: test_infinispan.py
fileNodes.summary: Tests for InfinispanExtractor. Mocks Maven metadata and GitHub release API to verify release body parsing produces changes.

fileNodes.name: test_jakarta_ee.py
fileNodes.summary: Tests for JakartaEEExtractor. Covers the EE9 boundary crossing (8.0.0→9.0.0), no-op when both versions >= 9.0.0, and no-op when both versions < 9.0.0.

fileNodes.name: test_registry.py
fileNodes.summary: Tests for the extractor registry (__init__.py). Verifies instantiation of all nine framework keys, unknown key error handling, stub extractor NotImplementedError behavior, and supported keys count.

fileNodes.name: test_resteasy.py
fileNodes.summary: Tests for RestEasyExtractor stub. Verifies that calling extract() raises NotImplementedError matching the RESTEasy display name.

fileNodes.name: test_spring_boot.py
fileNodes.summary: Tests for SpringBootExtractor. Mocks Maven metadata, GitHub release API, and wiki page responses to verify release body parsing and change type classification.

fileNodes.name: config.py
fileNodes.summary: Loads all runtime configuration from environment variables at import time, providing Neo4j credentials, model provider settings, rate-limit tuning, and feature flags with sensible defaults.

fileNodes.name: driver.py
fileNodes.summary: Implements a lazy singleton Neo4j driver with context-manager helpers for read and write sessions.

fileNodes.name: indexes.py
fileNodes.summary: Declares all Neo4j index and constraint DDL statements and applies them idempotently via ensure_indexes.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Package marker for Cypher query helpers.

fileNodes.name: pipeline.py
fileNodes.summary: Provides Cypher query helpers for Version node management and pipeline artifact path tracking.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Barrel module that re-exports all public model types from entities and graph sub-modules.

fileNodes.name: graph.py
fileNodes.summary: Defines read-model dataclasses for graph node types (Version, MigrationRule, MigrationStep, BreakingScope, MigrationContext) and the sortable_version utility function.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Package marker for the pipeline-core module.

fileNodes.name: populator.py
fileNodes.summary: Orchestrates writing a MigrationEntitiesBatch to Neo4j: ensures indexes, merges Version and MigrationRule nodes, writes MigrationStep and BreakingScope nodes idempotently.

fileNodes.name: conftest.py
fileNodes.summary: pytest conftest providing an autouse fixture that sets required NEO4J_* environment variables.

fileNodes.name: test_config.py
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests for the config module covering missing/empty required vars and type coercion.

fileNodes.name: test_indexes.py
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests for ensure_indexes verifying all DDL statements are executed and partial failures do not halt iteration.

fileNodes.name: test_models.py
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests for Pydantic entity models and graph value objects.

fileNodes.name: test_smoke.py
fileNodes.summary: Integration smoke test connecting to a live Neo4j instance to verify all expected constraints are applied.

fileNodes.name: conftest.py
fileNodes.summary: pytest conftest for pipeline-core tests providing env var fixtures.

fileNodes.name: test_populator_helpers.py
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests for derive_entity_classification covering actionable/incomplete/informational outcomes.

fileNodes.name: test_populator_idempotency.py
fileNodes.summary: Idempotency test for populate_graph using an in-memory FakeSession that replicates Cypher MERGE semantics.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Empty package initializer marking migration_oracle as a Python package with no public re-exports.

fileNodes.name: cli.py
fileNodes.summary: Click CLI entry point that wires the full export-extract-populate-framework pipeline command, orchestrating extraction, LLM filtering, entity extraction, and optional graph population with cache-flag and force-flag support.

fileNodes.name: _cache.py
fileNodes.summary: Provides the CacheFlags dataclass and resolve_cache_flags function, which compute skip/reuse decisions for all three pipeline stages based on artifact existence on disk and force-flag combinations.

fileNodes.name: _llm.py
fileNodes.summary: LLM service layer providing a LangChain provider factory (get_llm), retry-aware invocation (invoke_with_retry), and response-cleaning helpers used by both the filter and entity-extraction pipeline steps.

fileNodes.name: _paths.py
fileNodes.summary: Artifact path helpers that define the runs/ directory structure and expose path generators and a directory initialization utility.

fileNodes.name: extractor.py
fileNodes.summary: Entity-extraction orchestrator that converts filtered Markdown into a validated MigrationEntitiesBatch JSON via a structured LLM call or text-based fallback.

fileNodes.name: filters.py
fileNodes.summary: LLM filter pipeline step that converts raw changelog Markdown tables into a structured, severity-categorized Markdown document.

fileNodes.name: test_cache.py
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests for resolve_cache_flags covering JSON-cache skips, filtered-MD-cache skips, and force-extract stale warnings.

fileNodes.name: test_cli_cache_and_extract_only.py
fileNodes.summary: Integration tests for the CLI cache skip behaviour and --extract-only flag.

fileNodes.name: test_quickstart.py
fileNodes.summary: Quickstart integration test that exercises the full dry-run CLI path with mocked filter and entity-extraction steps.

fileNodes.name: wildfly.py
fileNodes.summary: Implements the WildFlyExtractor, an async HTTP extractor that discovers WildFly versions from Maven Central, fetches GitHub release notes, and enriches parsed changes with Jira issue metadata via concurrent async requests.

fileNodes.name: wildfly_jira.py
fileNodes.summary: Provides standalone Jira enrichment helpers for WildFly, including regex-based Jira key extraction, REST and HTML scraping fetch logic, and result parsing into typed cache entries.

fileNodes.name: test_wildfly.py
fileNodes.summary: Integration test for WildFlyExtractor.extract that mocks Maven metadata, GitHub releases, and the Jira REST API with respx to verify end-to-end change extraction.

fileNodes.name: test_wildfly_jira.py
fileNodes.summary: Unit tests for the WildFly Jira enrichment helpers, covering Jira key collection from release bodies and the full enrich_with_jira pipeline with mocked HTTP responses.

fileNodes.name: extensions.yml
fileNodes.summary: Spec Kit extensions registry declaring installed extensions (agent-context, git) and the full lifecycle hook schedule that wires git commits and agent-context updates around every core command.

fileNodes.name: feature.json
fileNodes.summary: Tracks the currently active Spec Kit feature directory, pointing to the 003-framework-http-extractors spec.

fileNodes.name: init-options.json
fileNodes.summary: Records Spec Kit initialization options including AI integration target (claude-code), branch numbering strategy (sequential), and the installed speckit version (0.9.2.dev0).

fileNodes.name: integration.json
fileNodes.summary: Manages multi-integration state for Spec Kit, listing installed integrations (cursor-agent, claude-code) and designating claude-code as the active default integration.

fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Documentation for the Spec Kit coding-agent-context extension explaining how it manages the CLAUDE.md (or equivalent) instruction file, its configurable markers, available commands, and how to disable it.

fileNodes.name: agent-context-config.yml
fileNodes.summary: Runtime configuration for the agent-context extension specifying the target context file (CLAUDE.md) and the start/end delimiter markers used to demarcate the Spec Kit managed section.

fileNodes.name: extension.yml
fileNodes.summary: Extension manifest for the agent-context Spec Kit extension, declaring its provided commands (speckit.agent-context.update), lifecycle hooks (after_specify, after_plan), metadata, and version requirements.

fileNodes.name: README.md
fileNodes.summary: Documentation for the Spec Kit git extension covering its five commands (initialize, feature, validate, remote, commit), the full hook schedule, configuration options, and cross-platform script inventory.

fileNodes.name: config-template.yml
fileNodes.summary: Canonical template for git-config.yml defining branch numbering strategy, init commit message, and per-lifecycle-hook auto-commit toggles with customizable messages; copied to git-config.yml on extension install.

fileNodes.name: extension.yml
fileNodes.summary: Extension manifest for the Spec Kit git extension declaring its five provided commands, the full before/after lifecycle hook bindings, required external tools (git), and default configuration values.

fileNodes.name: git-config.yml
fileNodes.summary: Active runtime configuration for the git extension controlling branch numbering strategy (sequential), initial commit message, and all per-event auto-commit enable/message settings (all disabled by default).

fileNodes.name: speckit.git.commit.md
fileNodes.summary: Command specification for the auto-commit hook that stages and commits all changes when invoked around a Spec Kit lifecycle event, using per-event enable flags and messages from git-config.yml.

fileNodes.name: speckit.git.feature.md
fileNodes.summary: Command specification for feature branch creation, detailing sequential vs timestamp numbering resolution, short-name generation heuristics, script invocation, and the GIT_BRANCH_NAME environment variable override.

fileNodes.name: speckit.git.initialize.md
fileNodes.summary: Command specification for Git repository initialization, covering script invocation, fallback commands, customization hooks, and graceful degradation when Git is unavailable.

fileNodes.name: speckit.git.remote.md
fileNodes.summary: Command specification for detecting the Git remote URL and extracting GitHub owner and repository name for issue-creation integration, with graceful degradation when no remote is configured.

fileNodes.name: speckit.git.validate.md
fileNodes.summary: Command specification for validating the current branch against sequential (NNN-) and timestamp (YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS-) naming patterns and confirming the corresponding spec directory exists under specs/.

fileNodes.name: auto-commit.sh
fileNodes.summary: Git extension script that automatically stages and commits changes after a Spec Kit lifecycle event, reading per-event enable/message configuration from git-config.yml.

fileNodes.name: create-new-feature.sh
fileNodes.summary: Extension-layer script that creates a sequentially or timestamp-numbered git feature branch, sourcing git-common.sh for shared utilities.

fileNodes.name: git-common.sh
fileNodes.summary: Minimal shared library of git-specific helpers for the git extension: has_git detection, effective-branch-name normalisation, and feature-branch pattern validation.

fileNodes.name: initialize-repo.sh
fileNodes.summary: Git extension script that initialises a new git repository with an initial commit, reading the commit message from git-config.yml.

fileNodes.name: auto-commit.ps1
fileNodes.summary: PowerShell equivalent of auto-commit.sh: stages and commits changes after a Spec Kit lifecycle event.

fileNodes.name: create-new-feature.ps1
fileNodes.summary: PowerShell equivalent of the bash create-new-feature script: computes sequential or timestamp-prefixed branch names.

fileNodes.name: git-common.ps1
fileNodes.summary: Minimal PowerShell library providing Test-HasGit, Get-SpecKitEffectiveBranchName, and Test-FeatureBranch.

fileNodes.name: initialize-repo.ps1
fileNodes.summary: PowerShell script that initialises a git repository with an initial commit.

fileNodes.name: claude-code.manifest.json
fileNodes.summary: Installation manifest for the Spec Kit claude-code integration (v0.9.2.dev0), recording install timestamp and SHA-256 checksums of deployed SKILL.md files.

fileNodes.name: cursor-agent.manifest.json
fileNodes.summary: Installation manifest for the Spec Kit cursor-agent integration (v0.9.2.dev0), recording SHA-256 checksums of deployed Cursor skill files.

fileNodes.name: speckit.manifest.json
fileNodes.summary: Installation manifest for the core speckit integration (v0.9.2.dev0), recording checksums of core bash scripts and templates installed under .specify/.

fileNodes.name: check-prerequisites.sh
fileNodes.summary: Unified prerequisite checker for the SDD workflow: validates the feature branch name and outputs a payload listing available documents.

fileNodes.name: common.sh
fileNodes.summary: Core shared library for all Spec Kit bash scripts: project-root discovery, git detection, feature-directory resolution, branch validation, template resolution with preset/extension composition strategies.

fileNodes.name: create-new-feature.sh
fileNodes.summary: Core script that creates a numbered git feature branch and initialises the specs/ directory with a scaffold spec.md.

fileNodes.name: setup-plan.sh
fileNodes.summary: Sets up the implementation plan file for the active feature by copying the plan-template into the feature directory.

fileNodes.name: setup-tasks.sh
fileNodes.summary: Validates that spec.md and plan.md exist, resolves the tasks template, and outputs paths for the tasks generation step.

fileNodes.name: checklist-template.md
fileNodes.summary: Spec Kit checklist template providing a numbered task-checklist scaffold that the /speckit-checklist command fills in with feature-specific items derived from spec.md, plan.md, and tasks.md.

fileNodes.name: constitution-template.md
fileNodes.summary: Spec Kit constitution template defining placeholder sections for core project principles, governance rules, and amendment policies that the /speckit-constitution command instantiates for a specific project.

fileNodes.name: plan-template.md
fileNodes.summary: Spec Kit implementation plan template providing structure for technical context, constitution checks, project directory layout, and complexity tracking that the /speckit-plan command populates for a feature branch.

fileNodes.name: spec-template.md

fileNodes.name: tasks-template.md
fileNodes.summary: Spec Kit task list template organizing implementation work into phased, user-story-aligned tasks with parallel execution markers, dependency ordering, and incremental delivery checkpoints that the /speckit-tasks command populates.

fileNodes.name: SPEC_ORGANIZATION.md
fileNodes.summary: Master spec sequencing index for the Migration Oracle project, documenting the six spec IDs (000-005), their dependency graph, per-spec completion gates, SpecKit runbook locations, and working conventions such as OPTIONAL MATCH usage and artifact path ownership.

fileNodes.name: export-extract-populate-framework-pipeline.md
fileNodes.summary: Comprehensive reference for the export-extract-populate-framework CLI command covering all seven pipeline phases (version resolution, upstream extraction, Jira enrichment, raw Markdown rendering, LLM filter-and-group, LLM entity extraction, and optional graph write), caching strategy, force flags, environment variables, and all nine supported frameworks.

fileNodes.name: extractor-research-report.md
fileNodes.summary: Research report documenting critical bugs and spec deviations found in the WildFly, Spring Boot, and Angular extractors, including silent omission of canonical migration sources, Jira enrichment defects, and pre-release filter gaps, with a prioritized action-item list.

fileNodes.name: graph-mcp-skills-and-paysafe-resolution.md

fileNodes.summary: Spec Kit checklist skill that generates custom requirement-quality checklists acting as unit tests for requirements writing on the current feature.

fileNodes.name: changes.py
fileNodes.summary: Public re-export shim for DocumentedChange and ExtractionResult, providing a stable import surface for extractor consumers without exposing the full entities module.
fileNodes.languageNotes: Pure re-export pattern using __all__ — no logic, just a public API alias for migration_oracle.models.entities.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Empty package initializer for the migration_oracle.graph namespace, making the directory a Python package without exposing any public symbols.

fileNodes.name: pyproject.toml
fileNodes.summary: Project build configuration for migration-oracle using hatchling, declaring 13 runtime dependencies (neo4j, pydantic, httpx, langchain, etc.), 4 dev dependencies, and two CLI entry points for the migration pipeline.

fileNodes.name: run_003b_verification.py
fileNodes.summary: Multi-level verification script for the 003b extractor improvements spec, testing extractor imports, CLI flags, logic correctness, and live HTTP extraction.

fileNodes.name: run_raw_extractions.sh
fileNodes.summary: Shell script that runs raw-only extraction for Angular, Spring Boot, and twelve WildFly major version hops using the migration-oracle CLI.

fileNodes.name: split_wildfly_raw.py
fileNodes.summary: Utility script that splits a multi-hop WildFly raw Markdown artifact into per-major-version-range files.

fileNodes.name: changelog-migration-extractor.skill
fileNodes.summary: Binary ZIP-packaged AI skill for extracting migration-impacting changes from framework changelog documents.

fileNodes.name: migration-filter.skill
fileNodes.summary: Binary ZIP-packaged AI skill for filtering, deduplicating, and categorizing raw migration change records.

fileNodes.name: speckit-sdd-buddy.skill
fileNodes.summary: Binary ZIP-packaged AI skill for Spec Kit SDD buddy assistance during software design document authoring.

fileNodes.name: verification-protocol-writer.skill
fileNodes.summary: Binary ZIP-packaged AI skill for writing structured verification protocol documents from feature specs.

fileNodes.name: __init__.py
fileNodes.summary: Empty package initializer making test_000_foundations a Python package discoverable by pytest.

fileNodes.name: test_driver.py
fileNodes.summary: Pytest test suite verifying the Neo4j driver singleton lifecycle: get_driver() returns the same instance, close_driver() resets the singleton.

fileNodes.name: conftest.py
fileNodes.summary: Pytest conftest providing the anyio_backend fixture set to asyncio for all async extractor tests.

fileNodes.name: 003-framework-http-extractors.md
fileNodes.summary: Boundary contract document for the framework HTTP extractor subsystem, defining 6 rules including the public extract() interface and no circular imports.

fileNodes.name: CLAUDE.md
fileNodes.summary: Coding agent context file that instructs Claude Code to read the feature plan at specs/003-framework-http-extractors/plan.md for project structure and technology context.
